home.title: Welcome to MyApp
home.subtitle: A professional Angular template with clean architecture, state management, i18n, and Tailwind CSS.

signals.title: Angular Signals
signals.description: Reactive state management with fine-grained reactivity using Angular's built-in signals.

standalone.title: Standalone Components
standalone.description: Module-free architecture with 100% standalone components, directives, and pipes.

tailwind.title: Tailwind CSS
tailwind.description: Utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI development with consistent design tokens.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Multi-language support with ngx-translate for seamless localization.

stateManagement.title: NgRx Signal Store
stateManagement.description: Lightweight, signal-based state management for predictable application state.

cleanArch.title: Clean Architecture
cleanArch.description: Well-organized project structure with core, shared, features, and layouts layers.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
